external_review._comment_alert: alert_if_missing: reserved (review is now interactive — never silently skipped)
external_review._comment_iterations: feedback_iterations: default 1 = external review is the default path. 0 = explicit opt-out; the consuming skill then runs a mandatory self-review ('2x denken') fallback instead. If > 0 and no API key is set, the skill interactively prompts the user.

models._comment: Models for external review. OpenRouter models used when OPENROUTER_API_KEY is set (recommended). Direct models used with GEMINI_API_KEY/OPENAI_API_KEY. Override per-environment via SHIPWRIGHT_REVIEW_MODEL_GEMINI / _CHATGPT / _OPENROUTER_GEMINI / _OPENROUTER_CHATGPT (resolved by lib.external_review_config.resolve_model).

llm_client._comment: Timeout and retry settings for external LLM calls
